post.summary: Performs a batch split for the outbound delivery item.
post.description: Creates a batch split item and sets a value for the delivery quantity.

post.description: Performs a batch split for the specified delivery item and sets a value for the picked quantity.

post.summary: Invoke action AssignHandlingUnitToDelivery
Sets picked quantity in base unit of measure for  delivery item.
post.description: Sets the picked quantity in base unit of measure of the specified delivery item.

post.description: Adds a serial number to the specified outbound delivery item.

post.description: Deletes the specified serial number from the outbound delivery item.

post.summary: Deletes all serial numbers from outbound delivery item.
post.description: Deletes all serial numbers from the outbound delivery item.

post.summary: Posts goods issue for outbound delivery.
post.description: Posts goods issue for the outbound delivery.

post.summary: Reverses goods issue for outbound delivery.
post.description: Reverses the goods issues for the outbound delivery.

post.summary: Confirms picked quantity of outbound delivery items.
post.description: Confirms the picked quantity of all outbound delivery items.

post.summary: Confirms picked quantity of outbound delivery item.
post.description: Confirms the picked quantity of the specified outbound delivery item.

post.summary: Takes over delivery quantity as picked quantity for all outbound delivery items.
post.description: Takes over the delivery quantity as the picked quantity for all items of the outbound delivery.

post.summary: Takes over delivery quantity as picked quantity for specified outbound delivery item.
post.description: Takes over the delivery quantity as the picked quantity for the specified outbound delivery item.

post.summary: Sets picked quantity and delivery quantity for outbound delivery item.
post.description: Sets the same value for picked quantity and delivery quantity in sales unit of measure for the specified outbound delivery item.

post.summary: Sets picked quantity and delivery quantity for outbound delivery item.
post.description: Sets the same value for picked quantity and delivery quantity in base unit of measure for the specified outbound delivery item.
